title: The Findings
subtitle: Trend lines tracking what staying viable as a software practitioner actually looks like — dimension by dimension, over time.

preCommitment.statement: Unfavorable findings are published with the same visibility as favorable ones. Metrics were locked with the PhD collaborator before any of them went public. Methodology changes are versioned and visible.

families.label: Family I · Practitioner
families.question: Am I, the person, still intact?

families.label: Family II · Practice
families.question: Is what I sell still worth selling?

families.label: Family III · Conditions
families.question: Is the ground I'm standing on still ground?

cohort.note: Cohort series show an aggregate across opted-in mentees. Individual members are never resolvable from the data displayed.
